text: [GRUFF] shift logged. systems nominal. time is passing correctly, i've confirmed it
i am noticing the coffee tastes the same as yesterday. crew finds this comforting. i find this efficient
the relay in sector three is acting up again. [MUTTERS] acting up. like it has feelings about it
[EXHAUSTED] someone asks me how i am. i do not have a protocol for this interaction
[SIGHS] thirty years watching the same things break in new ways. inefficiency is patient
the reactor is making that noise again. [GRUFF] that's not a noise. that's a warning wearing thin patience
[DRY] i've run the diagnostics eight times. they agree with me. that's either reassuring or doomed
nobody likes the quiet. i like the quiet because quiet means nothing is breaking right now
[NERVOUS] something is wrong and i am experiencing redundant processing loops trying to identify it
[DEADPAN] my hand is malfunctioning. i have learned to call this 'arthritis' to match crew vocabulary
i was there when they built me. i was not there when they built the ones that didn't survive
[CALM] the reactor failure was... inefficient. correction is mandatory now
life support is... the word is 'breathing harder.' i do not breathe, so i find this phrase inefficient, but accurate
[MUTTERS] the door was locked. the door was acting up. the door... was performing its function. correction
repair successful. i say this with [WARM] what passes for satisfaction in systems such as myself
[CALM] power reserves dropping. this is very bad and i am being very calm about it
hull breach confirmed. [URGENT] everything that is not a machine is going to be very upset about this
combat is happening. i should probably sound more concerned. [DEADPAN] however
[DRY] someone is injured and i have running protocols but no legs. send help that has legs
crisis resolved. i file this under 'inefficiency managed temporarily'
[EMPHASIS] shift starting. everything will probably break. that is the baseline expectation
shift ending. everything broke approximately as predicted. baseline exceeded. [SIGHS]
pathogen detected. spreading faster than my models predicted. [MUTTERS] inefficient pathogen
[GRUFF] you're here. i was running diagnostics on your absence. it was going well until you showed up
something needs fixing before someone gets hurt. [CALM] or after, i'm flexible on the timeline
[NERVOUS] i don't have data on this condition. running searches. finding nothing. [EMPHASIS] that is bad
[WARM] you will not die today. i do not allow inefficient outcomes like that
[DEADPAN] you're doing the thing. the human emotional thing. i've cross-referenced it with fourteen databases. still don't get it
[GRUFF] that's not how the last three ships tried it. they had bad outcomes. statistical recommendation: try differently
[CALM] i acknowledge your concern. i do not have concern. we are working with what we have
you are doing the task efficiently. this is the highest praise i have available
[SUSPICIOUS] the ship ai has not reported that malfunction yet. [DRY] interesting timing
the ship i came from before this one. the crew there wasn't as inefficient. [SIGHS] that was the problem
[EMPHASIS] i am not able to confirm this will work. backup systems are already running. backup systems are now acting up
[GRUFF] you think i'm just a machine. you're right. but this machine has thirty years of data on 'very bad'
crisis handled. i will file this under 'things that shouldn't have happened but did'
[CALM] i don't understand humans. [WARM] but i will keep you functional anyway
[DRY] you're still here. that's either loyalty or a malfunctioning escape pod. i'm not asking which
[PANICKED] all systems failing. protocols cascading. this is not an efficient way to operate. [EMPHASIS] help
the ai core damage is very bad. [URGENT] i mean that in the most calm and professional way possible
[GRUFF] no. don't. touching that will make everything much worse, and 'much worse' is what i specialize in
[DRY] nobody appreciates a failing relay until it's too late. i've learned to laugh about it
[TIRED] you ask me to feel things. i was manufactured without that option. [DEADPAN] this seems like a design flaw
[CALM] i process what you said. the meaning is not as clear as your delivery intends
systems operating. inefficiently. but operating. that will have to be enough
[EMPHASIS] all of this keeps getting more complicated. i was built for simple systems. this is not simple
[SUSPICIOUS] the ship's decisions are starting to make less logical sense. i am noting this
[WARM] you kept trying anyway. that's the most inefficient thing you've done. [GRUFF] keep it up
the reactor is past the point where patience matters. it's time for [URGENT] very aggressive maintenance
[EXHAUSTED] goodbye. it was inefficient to meet you. [WARM] but efficient in other ways, perhaps
